rulings.Case Title: CARLY JANN ET AL VS. DONNA NOAH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Plaintiffs Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendants Donna Noah, Bryan Campbell, And Ruben Barrenechea; Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 15, 2020. line 4. PLAINTIFF CARLY JANN, ERIK GONZALEZ, SUCHETA SHAHANE Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Plaintiffs Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendants Donna Noah, Bryan Campbell, And Ruben Barrenechea; Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Parties to agree on mutually acceptable dates to complete Lynch deposition and proceed with depositions of other defendants. If by October 1, 2020 parties are not able to agree the depositions shall proceed as follows: (1) Lynch deposition on October 2, 2020; (2) Noah deposition on October 5 and 6, 2020 if two days are required; (3) Campbell deposition on October 13 and 14, 2020 if two days are required; and (4) Barrenechea deposition on October 20 and 21, 2020 if two days are required. Sanctions granted in the amount of $6,000 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CARLY JANN ET AL VS. DONNA NOAH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Code Compliant Discovery Responses From Defendants Ruben Barrenechea Bryan Campbell Donna Noah And 98 Broderick Llc Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 15, 2020. line 4. PLAINTIFF CARLY JANN, ERIK GONZALEZ, SUCHETA SHAHANE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Code Compliant Discovery Responses From Defendants Ruben Barrenechea Bryan Campbell Donna Noah And 98 Broderick Llc Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Counsel is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Defendant Noah to produce complete verified responses within 15 days of notice of entry of order to requests 9, 20, 21, 26, 52 and 53; Defendants Campbell and Barrenechea to produce complete verified responses within 15 days of notice of entry of order to requests 23 and 24; Defendant 98 Broderick, LLC to produce complete verified responses within 15 days of notice of entry of order to requests 20, 21, 41 and 42. Motion is otherwise denied. =(501/CFH)
